title: Soul of Origins
description: An origins modpack made for Soul of Origins server.
body:
Soul of Origins is an origins centric fabric modpack focused on providing a satisfying and extensive multiplayer experience with a dedicated server boasting a striving community. Our modpack prioritizes a balance of performance, collaborative gameplay, and exploration featuring mods such as origins to let every player play at their own pace, better combat to make every weapon feel unique and interactive, backpacks and structure mods to make exploration rewarding, Bosses of mass destruction and similar mods to create gratifying challenges for players to overcome, and mods such as cosmetica take player customization to another level creating a perfect gameplay experience for those interested in a mutliplayer origins experience. This modpack is intended for the Soul of Origins server where we use datapacks to improve the gameplay experience and add a number of origins and terrain generation. 

To enjoy the full Soul of Origins experience, join our discord and play on our dedicated server         
(discord link is: https:discord.gg/dttMzDGTJQ ) 
(server IP is: souloforigins.modded.fun)
